Title convention: keep the "[BUG]" prefix and add a short summary, e.g.
"[BUG] Login returns 500 when email has uppercase".

relevant `service:` label (service: api-gateway / identity / provider /
review / job / notification / media / chat) and any area label (backend, ui,
database, security, …).
